name: Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonPoint
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonPoint
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangePolygonPoint( dword polygonID, dword index, dword x, dword y ); // form 1
description: The function changes the position of a point of a polygon object. A Change Polygon Point command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: polygonID
parameters.description: Object ID of a polygon object
